goal: Create a smoke test matrix that verifies the example app is fully integrated and shippable.
constraints: Smoke matrix must cover every route defined in app/(shell)/
Build check script must be runnable with: bash .tasks/smoke/build-check.sh
Manual smoke path must not require a human to know internal agent IDs — derive from /api/agents
SSE test must verify that at least one delta event arrives within 10 s
done_criteria: .tasks/smoke/SMOKE-MATRIX.md exists with rows for: build, every route render, mobile nav at 375px, chat send, SSE connect/disconnect, empty state (no history), error state (daemon offline)
.tasks/smoke/build-check.sh exists and exits 0 on a clean repo
Manual smoke path is documented step-by-step and executable without code knowledge
All rows have PASS/FAIL/SKIP status filled in for the current build
escalation_rules: Escalate to coordinator if any route returns 500 or blank page during smoke run
Escalate if mobile nav bottom bar is not visible at 375 px after UI wiring changes
Escalate if SSE stream never emits delta — this is a blocker for the merge
